exercises.stem: Which is the correct past tense of "see"?
exercises.analysis: see 是不规则动词，过去式是 saw。seed 是名词「种子」，seen 是过去分词，seeing 是现在分词。
yesterday 表示过去时间，动词要用过去式。go 的过去式是 went。

exercises.stem: They ___ dinner at 7 o'clock last night.
exercises.analysis: last night 表示过去时间，动词要用过去式。eat 的过去式是 ate。

exercises.stem: The correct sentence is: "She didn't went to school."
exercises.analysis: 用了 didn't 后，动词必须用原形。正确句子是：She didn't go to school.

segments: We ___2___ (not see) the movie last week.
exercises.analysis: yesterday 表示过去，write 的过去式是 wrote。否定句用 didn't + 动词原形。

exercises.question: 用不规则动词的正确形式填空并说明理由：I ___ (take) the bus to school yesterday, but my brother ___ (not come) with me.
exercises.referenceAnswer: I took the bus to school yesterday, but my brother didn't come with me. 理由：take 是不规则动词，过去式是 took。否定句用 didn't + 动词原形 come。
scoringPoints: 能解释 take 是不规则动词，过去式是 took
能解释否定句用 didn't + 动词原形
